ItacAcademyItem.Name: Pellegrini (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: According to Giorgio Masi, Coreografie doniane: L`Accademia Pellegrina, in `Cinquecento capriccioso e irregolare. Eresie letterarie nell`Italia del classicismo`, ed. Paolo Procaccioli e Angelo Romano (1999), this Academy was Doni`s own invention, and never existed in reality.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
